{{CargoClone
|name=Mr. Raccoon
|rank=purple
|cabin=2
|id=70
|gene1={race} DEF +30
|gene2={race} FAME +30
|gene3=Per 30 Demon Minions in battle:
> Troop DEF +8
|gene4=Gene Simulation Power Checks -0.6%
|gene5=Per 30 Demon Minions in battle:
> Troop DEF +12
|gene6=Gene Simulation Power Checks -0.9%
|}}
